args.code:
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
import requests
import re
r = requests.get('https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Search?search=task+002&go=Go')
soup = BeautifulSoup(r.text, 'html.parser')
events = soup.find_all(text=re.compile(r'task 002'))
event_list = [event for event in events if event]
if event_list:
    event_list = [str(event) for event in event_list]
    print('1. Not found in search results: ' + str(event_list[0]))
else:
    print('No events found')
print('2. Not found in search results: ' + str(event_list[1]))
print('3. Not found in search results: ' + str(event_list[2]))
